title: How To Design a Complete Brand Identity With AI (Best AI Logo Maker)
summary: Design.com is an AI-powered platform for generating complete brand identities including logos, brand kits, business cards, and social media templates. The tool uses AI logo generation with plain-English editing and auto-applies brand decisions across 500,000+ templates without manual re-coloring. Features include animated logos, background removal, presentation generation, and domain naming.

Additional features shown include animated logos, background removal, presentation generation, and domain naming.
